label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 18

extraction.one_line_summary: LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel attacked solo on the final climb Gamonitero, winning by 14 seconds over ROGLIČ who marked BERNAL's earlier attack.
tactical_patterns: STORER attacked 70km from finish on La Covatoria to secure KOM points, forcing rivals to chase early.
BERNAL attacked first on Gamonitero forcing ROGLIČ to respond personally, revealing who he considers the real GC threat.
DE LA CRUZ launched after MÍCHKA's pacing work, demonstrating UAE sacrificing breakaway stage chances for domestique positioning work.
LÓPEZ attacked only after GC group reabsorbed earlier moves, exploiting fatigue from ROGLIČ marking BERNAL and MAS.

rider_signals.STORER Michael: positive: attacked 70km out on category 2 climb to claim virtual KOM lead, showing confidence in extreme-distance efforts
rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: positive: only attacked after ROGLIČ had already responded to BERNAL, tactically patient unlike typical explosive style
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: neutral: marked BERNAL personally but not LÓPEZ, revealing hierarchy of threats despite finishing 14 seconds down
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: attacked first on final climb but couldn't sustain when ROGLIČ covered, showing limits on longest climbs
rider_signals.DE LA CRUZ David: positive: bridged to STORER after 70km solo breakaway, targeting top-10 GC from 8:34 down with extreme-range move
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: teammate STORER attacked from break but BARDET sat up rather than supporting, DSM prioritizing KOM over stage
